Pre Order

Netgate 8300 MAX pfSense+ Security Gateway

RM 1.00

Enterprise 1U rackmount security gateway with Intel C3758 8-core processor @ 2.2 GHz, 16 GB RAM, and 128 GB NVMe SSD. Supports high-speed expansion cards for 25GbE/100GbE connectivity.

Configure Your Device
Total:RM 1.00
Request QuotationContact Sales
Included with Purchase:
  • 1 Year Hardware Warranty
  • TAC Lite Support (24x7)
  • pfSense+ Software License
  • Automatic Configuration Backup

Product Overview

The Netgate® 8300 MAX is a premium 1U rackmount security gateway powered by Intel C3758 8-core processor @ 2.2 GHz with QuickAssist Technology. With 16 GB DDR4 RAM, 128 GB NVMe SSD, and flexible expansion options for high-speed networking, it's designed for demanding enterprise environments.

Delivers exceptional 18.50 Gbps routing and supports expansion cards for 25GbE/100GbE connectivity. Perfect for data centers, large enterprises, and service providers.

Best For:
  • Large Enterprises & Data Centers
  • Service Providers (MSP/MSSP)
  • High-availability deployments
  • Multi-gigabit WAN connections
  • Advanced VPN concentrators
Key Highlights
  • Intel C3758 8-core
  • 16 GB DDR4 RAM
  • 18.50 Gbps Routing
  • 25/100GbE Expansion
  • 1U Rack Mount
  • QuickAssist (QAT)

Technical Specifications

CPUIntel Atom C3758 8-Core @ 2.2 GHz with QuickAssist (QAT) and AES-NI
System Memory16 GB DDR4 RAM
Storage128 GB NVMe M.2 SSD
Network Interfaces(2) 10 GbE SFP+
(2) 1 GbE Combo (RJ45/SFP)
(4) 2.5 GbE RJ-45
Optional 25GbE/100GbE expansion
Form Factor1U Rackmount
PowerDual redundant PSU support
CoolingActive (enterprise-grade fans)
CertificationsCE, FCC, RoHS

Performance Metrics

L3 Forwarding
IPERF318.50 Gbps
Firewall
IPERF39.93 Gbps
IPsec VPN
(w/QAT)
IPERF31.77 Gbps
Performance Note

Maximum Active Connections: 4,000,000. QuickAssist Technology for hardware-accelerated encryption.

pfSense Plus Software Features

Router
  • Multi-WAN with load balancing
  • Policy-based routing
  • High Availability clustering
Security
  • IDS/IPS with Snort/Suricata
  • Advanced firewall rules
  • Geo-blocking
Support
  • 24x7x365 Technical Support
  • TAC Lite included
  • Contact: enquiry@kflegacyresources.com
Warranty
  • 1 year hardware warranty
  • 30 day return policy
